历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023 (Science), the lowest rank was approximately 12546; in 2024 (Physics Category), about 17556; in 2025 (Physics Category), about 19522. Rankings have been declining over the past two years, with a drop of about 1966 from 2024 to 2025, and a cumulative drop of about 6976; the 2025 baseline is about 19522; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 18 in 2023, 38 in 2024, 30 in 2025, and 33 in 2026, an increase of 10% compared to 2025, a moderate expansion, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable or slightly rising trend in recent years; the 2024 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (teacher ethics incident), but the overall Douyin comprehensive heat ranking was 15th (high heat), indicating high overall attention; no obvious record of admission gaps; Psychology A-, Education A-, with moderate relevance to Physics Category majors (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biological Sciences, etc.), but the overall strength of teacher-training disciplines is relatively strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and other majors were rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation as 'highly recommended', with high application enthusiasm for related majors; Teacher-training/Education majors are 'differentiated and wait-and-see'; the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is 474,900, with an estimated Physics Category of about 267,800 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 264,400 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings, the upward push on rankings from the 10% enrollment expansion in 2026, the slight increase in the total number of provincial examinees, and the sustained high popularity of Computer Science/Electronic Information and other hot majors intensifying competition, taking into account the increase in examinee numbers and hot major popularity, the predicted lowest rank is approximately 20723, with a range of 20223–21223.
